programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from Last Chance Kitchen on who should return to the competition. Then the chefs take off in a Quickfire with Padma and Jonathan Waxman making a two-course Business-Class dish for an airline. For their final challenge in Los Angeles before jetting off to Italy for the finale, the chefs go to Michael’s Santa Monica, where they meet Chef and Restaurateur Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California Cuisine. With only five chefs moving onto the finals, the chefs will have to reimagine one of Michael’s iconic dishes from across the years and serve it to a table of celebrated alumni of Michael’s kitchen, including Roy Yamaguchi, Jonathan Waxman, Sang Yoon, Mark Peel and Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.desc: Nicholas keeps stuffing oversized objects inside Eden’s fairy home. programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: From night stalker missions to rescue operations, see how the Little Bird helicopter earned its place among the big boys.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Watch the massive military transport aircraft C-5 Galaxy come up big time and again over its five decades of service

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In his quest to find the best ingredients for his banquet dinner, Adam Liaw visits a colourful fruit and veg market in Geylang and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In between some cocktail-tasting pit stops, Adam Liaw discovers some of the finest desserts in Singapore, from homemade Peranakan sweet treats to a sophisticated dessert bar.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw gathers what he has learned over the past few weeks to serve up an impressive five-course banquet dinner to some distinguished guests, including his mother.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, it's an anxious time for Zoo vets as they work to save one of the most endangered birds on the planet, and the ectotherm team are on a mission in the wild South Island.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Zoo welcomes two crocodiles to the Swamp Forest, the new South East Asia habitat opens and the team prepare for the birth of a baby southern white rhino.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu heads to Hong Kong, the fourth country on his around the world tour, and he has some great food excursions lined up. Chicken feet, Tim Ho Wan, street food and lots to fit in before he jumps across the pond to Tokyo, Japan.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: As Manu heads past his halfway mark on his journey around the world, he heads to Tokyo to explore the bustling city. It is a massive challenge and he is having the time of his life but how is that budget going?

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: It is the home stretch with just one more country on Manu's list. America offers amazing food experiences on his final leg of his adventure. Around the world. Thirty days. $20,000 to spend. Will Manu achieve his dream?

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson embeds with the team of one of the most extreme, avalanche-prone mountain ski mountains in the world - Snowbird. They battle to keep the steep and deep slopes safe with shovels, snowcats and even a WWII Howitzer cannon.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson goes to the biggest automated package sorting facility in the world - UPS Worldport in Louisville, Kentucky. Two million packages go through here every day, and it's up to the hardhat heroes behind the scenes to make it all happen.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: Examine '60s ad men and women and how they used wit and irony to reach a new audience, consequently revolutionizing the industry.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: See how stricter rules and public mistrust inspired 1970s advertisers to create some of history's greatest campaigns.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: See how advertisers used a new optimism and new technology to sell big in the "Greed is Good" era.

programme.title: Gameplay: The Story of the Videogame Revolution
programme.desc: Gameplay is a feature on the history of videogames. From Pong to Pac Man, Super Mario to Lara Croft, Doom, Grand Theft Auto and beyond, we chronicle the remarkable story of the fastest evolving new media of all time.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: Now we know why Crypto is such a big deal, through this episode we’ll meet the family behind one of NZ’s biggest Crypto success stories. We’ll dispel some crypto myths and cover the basics of how to get on board.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: CEO Aaron McDonald and Co-Founder Brooke Howard-Smith tell us how they created a multi-million dollar NFT business here in Aotearoa and are collaborating with international superstars.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Cruise’s stunt coordinator Wade Eastwood, Taps co-star Billy Van Zandt, Interview With The Vampire producer Stephen Woolley, plus many more.

programme.title: P!nk: Fearless
programme.desc: Pink is a powerhouse of pop and rock music. Although initially seen as yet another act in the late 90’s crowd of teen pop acts, she has since gone on to define her own genre and solidified her place as a standout from the rest. She is a force to be reckoned with in the music scene.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: On their first day at Palomino Bluffs, the girls are determined to make a good impression. Cue the beachfront race — and a daring rescue!

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: With the Galra empire in upheaval Team Voltron realizes that now is the time to unite the galaxy and bring the fight to Zarkon

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Bob wants to join LarryBoy's team of heroes, but keeps getting in the way/Tina starts a volunteer fire department with Bob and Larry.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Rooney the Olive Hound gets jealous when Ichabeezer finds a lost puppy and takes care of it. /Larry's jealous when his incredibly talented and accomplished cousin George visits.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Nicholas keeps stuffing oversized objects inside Eden’s fairy home. But it creates a BIG problem when Harper’s family wants to visit grandma and the car keys are nowhere to be found! / When Harper gets sick, Marcus builds a pulley between their apartments to send Harper treats. But when Qwak, the chipmunk, breaks the pulley, the Dews must step in to keep the treat train running.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag worries that she's no longer a "Go" dog, Lady Lydia helps her find a new persona by helping Tag try on a bunch of different hats. Luckily, when a runaway puppy needs to be wrangled, and only the speedy Tag can catch him, Tag realizes she was a Go dog all along. \ Sergeant Pooch reads Scooch, Tag and Kit a story book during their sleepover. But when the last pages are missing, the three kids work together to make up their own ending to the story.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag, Scooch and Kit think they found the perfect story for their newspaper: Bigpaw is in Pawston! But when they find out that Frank and Beans were lying to the town, they seek to uncover the truth and reveal it to everyone. \ When Sam Whippet sets up a pirate-themed race for the Race Cadets, pirate-loving Scooch takes on the role of captain. Tag struggles to take orders as first mate while helping Scooch navigate maritime obstacles and avoid the fearsome pirates.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty and the crew must protect the Flatirons from Pounder, a predatory Poundersaurolophus who marks his territory by hammering everything in sight

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky, Spirit and the PALs rescue a lone wolf pup and keep it hidden in town until it can be returned to its mother.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: When all the other students at the Academy find out Cleo is the prophesied "Savior of the Galaxy," she worries they'll treat her differently. Then she worries they won't. Then there's this freaky bug lady.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: It turns out the Space Pirates are so cool, you guys! Cleo, Akila and Brian get captured by them, but they're so cool it's almost hard to be mad at them, you know?

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Grug and Eep get into an argument and end up switching places to prove how hard it is to the other to be them. We follow Eep as the parent and Grug as the teenager at school and at home

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Grug wants a day off from his honey-do-list so he subs in doppelganger Gurg/Eep and Thunk set out to sabotage Bulk and Sulk's "idea fair" project because they always win even though Snoot comes up with the ideas.

programme.title: Dragons: Riders of Berk
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless search for other Night Furies.

programme.title: Dragons: Riders of Berk
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are kidnapped and must escape Outcast Island.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders “borrow” the bathysphere to rescue a dragon from the depths of the Giant Realm Sea.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: While punished, Tom must sneak out to rescue the Riders from Buzzsaw.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom orchestrates a “safe” tour of the realms to convince Olivia that the Hidden World is safe for them to explore.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders “borrow” the bathysphere to rescue a dragon from the depths of the Giant Realm Sea.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: While punished, Tom must sneak out to rescue the Riders from Buzzsaw.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom orchestrates a “safe” tour of the realms to convince Olivia that the Hidden World is safe for them to explore.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When the kids grow over-confident after beginning their training, they decide to intercept a distress call and sneak off without permission, only to land themselves in hot water

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Po and the kids are recruited to perform in Mei Mei's theatrical show, but things take a turn when Jindiao ruins the play in order to find a mystical scroll

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Jindiao arrives to the Village, he invites the kids to participate in an exhibition match, but has alternative motives

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim undertakes his first Trollhunting mission by starting small: he must shrink down to eight inches tall to apprehend a mischievous gnome.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Douxie, Claire, Steve and Jim meet the legendary King Arthur and his sister, Morgana, in medieval Camelot — where being a troll is punishable by death.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With the future at stake, Douxie and Claire cling to the hope that Arthur and Morgana can reconcile. Meanwhile, humans are hunting trolls in the woods.

programme.title: Food Factory 2
programme.desc: Discover how old world flavour is lovingly baked into rustic and crusty Baltic dark rye bread; sweet and chewy Duo cookies cater to the tastes of chocolate and vanilla lovers alike; tangy Japanese ginger carrot dressing complements Western as well as Asian dishes.

programme.title: Food Factory 2
programme.desc: Discover how humble rice and sugar are transformed into a gooey, crunchy marshmallow bar topped with rainbow-coloured chocolate chips; the root, stem and flowery part of a Japanese plant are pureed into a delicate but very spicy sidekick to sushi.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Danube: Europe's Mightiest River 1
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan 1
programme.desc: Reza ventures into an unexplored canyon in Saudi Arabia, searching for clues of lost civilizations.

programme.title: Food Factory 2
programme.desc: Discover how crispy, lip-smacking Kettle potato chips are specially crinkled for maximum dipping power; sweet, melt-in-your-mouth meringue cookies get their delicate texture in an unconventional oven.

programme.title: Food Factory 2
programme.desc: Discover how an aromatic blend of exotic spices is packed into pakoras, a mouthwatering, deep-fried Indian fritter; the bakers of decadently custardy Napoleon bars fold thousands of tiny layers into flaky French pastry; fiery jalapeno peppers are added to a creamy, nutty hummus.

programme.title: Asia 1
programme.desc: Asia has the longest coastline of any continent and the earth's richest coral reefs. This episode explores Asia's waters, as spectacular as they are diverse, and never-seen-before animal behaviour.

programme.title: Griff's Canadian Adventure 1
programme.desc: British comedian and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones explores the Frozen Wilds of Manitoba, North Canada, and visits a town that sometimes has more polar bears than people.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather 5
programme.desc: A wind driven wildfire consumes a Colorado neighbourhood. In New Mexico, freezing conditions trap 21 people in an ice-covered tram car.

programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: Cabbage your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join award-winning Malaysian actress Siti Saleha and her husband as they explore the city by day and venture into the night, discovering its vibrant culture and hidden treasures.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex’s success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael cooks a flavourful Mexican-style dish of halibut fish tacos along with pico de gallo, while John serves up a tall glass of refreshing watermelon margaritas.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Tonight’s elimination is a plant-based challenge, where contestants go head-to-head tore-create a well-known meat dish using only plant-based ingredients for their chance to secure the Top 10.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by bringing us three different pastas in three colours. She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Old Flames, New Fire
programme.desc: When her father, Michael Luck, becomes a person of interest in the death of his ex-business partner, Lisa must do whatever she can to help. This means she will need to enlist the aid of her mother, Gabbi.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James takes on a dying home in need of a major facelift: a 104-year-old house brought to him by a rookie flipper. With the property in dire condition, James and his team must rethink the layout.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: With the Top 10 decided, it’s Day One of Sweet Week and Adriano Zumbo kicks things off with a wonderfully wobbly jelly Mystery Box.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.desc: Rachael prepares a delicious Puerto Rican-style cold shrimp salad, also known as ensalada de Camarones, with avocado, corn and rice, that's perfect for serving as the weather turns warm.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)

programme.title: Building Batavia
programme.desc: In 1619, the Dutch took control of what is now Jakarta and tried to turn it into a tropical Amsterdam. How did they do it, and what remains of their grand plan?

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S5)
programme.desc: It's 1935, and a hot-headed Kentucky gas station owner named Harland Sanders develops a new method for making fried chicken, drawing customers from far and wide.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: The Founding Fathers established the pillars of freedom and democracy. New information has emerged about the secrets of these important historical figures. What truths have remained in the shadows?

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo (S1)
programme.desc: From a mythical monster that turns out to be real to one of the deadliest prehistoric animals on the planet, these startling discoveries shock and terrify the world.

programme.title: Alone (S11)
programme.desc: As the competition continues to drain the survivalists, they soon face a reckoning with the strategies they've implemented. All of them seem to be teetering over the edge.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S5)
programme.desc: In the 1950s, middle-aged salesman Ray Kroc is drowning in debt when he's inspired by a roadside burger stand he wants to spread nationwide—McDonald's.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: The American frontier is rich with legends of Native Americans and outlaws, but also eerie tales of cursed mountains, monsters, and UFOs. Could these tales be true? Is the Wild West stranger than we think?

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick tries not to slip up when making a deal on a pair of snowshoes used in World War II. Then, Rick and Corey get a blast from the past when they go see a hand cannon from the 1600s.

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: The legend that warns against digging on Skinwalker Ranch becomes all too real as the team breaks ground near the Triangle.

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: The biggest names in computers go head-to-head in a race to create the first portable computers. Through massive failures and shocking alliances, they'll usher in their first-ever handheld device.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: The search for the most famous gold mine in the Old West has led many to perish in the pursuit of its elusive riches. Legend suggests the gold and the land it's hidden on are somehow cursed.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: Whether they're used to stop treasure hunters, body snatchers, or wartime enemies, booby traps are diabolical devices just waiting to kill.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: The remaining three survivalists continue to push their limits as they reach nearly a month in the Great Karoo Desert. One participant loses the use of a major tool and all their hope along with it.

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin II
programme.desc: In this second battle of the war against US aggression and to aid Korea, the 7th Infantry Company is tasked to attack the Water Gate Bridge. Facing extreme weather conditions, the 7th Company risk their lives to successfully destroy the Water Gate Bridge, thereby blocking the US army’s retreat to Xingnan Port.

programme.title: The Magnificent Trio
programme.desc: A group of farmers who are being oppressed by the local magistrates kidnap one of the magistrate’s daughter in the hope of being heard by the authorities. A wandering swordsman offers his help and aiding him are two fighters who have both switched sides from being the oppressors to the oppressed. The trio fight back against the magistrates!

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: On his way back to the midlands, Guo Jing meets Huang Rong and they quickly fall in love. However, Ouyang Ke proposes to marry Huang Rong at the same time, so Huang’s father sets up a duel for the two men to compete for her hand. Guo Jing finally beats Ouyang Ke to win Huang Rong back.

programme.title: Trouble Girl
programme.desc: Xiao Xiao suffers from ADHD and faces bullying in school. Her mother sees her as a troublemaker, while her father toils abroad. The only solace comes from her empathetic teacher, Paul. During a typhoon, Xiao Xiao discovers a secret between her mother and Paul, unravelling complex emotions and shared helplessness in life.

programme.title: Ready O/R Knot
programme.desc: Guy and Heidi have been together for five years since they first met in a wedding banquet, but marriage soon becomes a challenge to their relationship. Heidi sees marriage as a testimony of their love, while Guy sees it as doomsday. Can the couple resolve their conflict? Are they ready or not?

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Sinister - The Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Man of Iron
programme.desc: A fearless fighter, Chou Lian Huan has risen to power in Shanghai with his exceptional combat skills. He risks his life for hostess Shen Ju Fang and embarks on a series of fierce battles against the son of a notorious triad leader and his gang, ultimately becoming a scapegoat in the gang's deadly turf war.

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: In this action comedy, two young men join a rebel group after the Chinese Revolution of 1911 and accidentally become patriotic heroes. Assisted by a warlord’s daughter, they successfully help the rebels steal weapons from the warlord.

programme.title: New Tales of the Flying Fox
programme.desc: In a great rendition of The Silver Fox and Legend of the Fox comes this exciting adventure, where the only thing between the clan leaders and certain death is Hui Ying-hung.

programme.title: 3AM - The Office
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Two Champions of Shaolin
programme.desc: Set in the Qing Dynasty, the Shaolin clan wants to overthrow Qing and restore the Ming Dynasty, while the Wudang clan is backed by the Qing government. The two renowned clans eventually set themselves up against each other, and a series of vicious fighting has just begun…

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Vital Signs
programme.desc: Paramedic Wang partners with Ma after being reassigned to a new station. Initially, Wang disagrees with Ma’s unconventional methods, but over time, Ma helps him rediscover the true mission of a paramedic - saving every life.

programme.title: Pursuit of Vengeance
programme.desc: Kung Fu legend Ti Lung stars in the action movie as Fu Xue Hong, embarking on a epic journey of revenge for his father.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels. Yet, he is touched by these rebels who are resisting the Mongolian invasion of their homeland. Will Marco Polo stay loyal to the emperor?

programme.title: Isla 2
programme.desc: Celso Ad Castillo once again directs with newcomer Via Veloso in the title role of Isla, the young girl who will do anything just to be able to escape her lustful adoptive father and the desolate island where she might spend her entire life.

programme.title: Tumayo Ka't Lumaban
programme.desc: Crisanto (Ronnie Ricketts) is a man with a mission. Circumstances have forced him and his sister to be raised by separate foster families. But now, Crisanto is determined to find his sister.

programme.title: Ugat
programme.desc: It is World War II and Filipino guerilla leader Gabriel (Mario Escudero) is the Japanese soldiers' most wanted. He is cornered while visiting his family. Years later, nephew Carding (George Estregan) is all grown up and ready to avenge his father and sister's death.

programme.title: Tag-Araw, Tag-Ulan
programme.desc: A woman who was running away from the pain of a broken love affair. A young man who was looking forward to a fun-filled summer and his first sex experience.

programme.title: Demolisyon
programme.desc: This film presents the struggles of people to have a home of their own and the pain and the anguish they face when they are forced out of their homes and the shanties they thought they owned are demolished.

programme.title: Lucas Abelardo
programme.desc: His sincerity and great dedication to his work is what distinguished police officer Lucas Abelardo from his other colleagues. But keeping to his principles while doing his job is not easy.

programme.title: Takas sa Impiyerno
programme.desc: Hell is what the residents call their town. It is because Mayor Sebastian (Paquito Diaz) virtually sees the town as his own personal kingdom.

programme.title: Mauna Ka... Susunod Ako!
programme.desc: When Gerry's father Eric dies in the hands of criminal elements, he goes to his father's bestfriend Arthur for guidance.

programme.title: Dapat ka Bang Mahalin?
programme.desc: The story, which was based on a popular comic’s serial, closely resembled what would later happen in real life to local moviedom's favorite couple. Sharon and Gabby portrayed teenagers who eloped and got married against the advice of everybody.

programme.title: Ang Misis kong Hoodlum
programme.desc: When Andy marries Grace, he is surprised to discover that her family are staying with them. Andy becomes the "house-band" and serves his wife and her family.

programme.title: Hotshots (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This is a story of adolescent boys and girls and their early experiences in life and love. How they took life’s realities and learned its lessons. Starring the country’s top singer Gary Valenciano and matinee idol Aga Mulach.

programme.title: The Flor Contemplacion Story (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: The tragic tale of the Filipino maid hanged for the murder in Singapore in 1995 not only called the attention to the plight of overseas workers everywhere in the world but also resulted in one of the most acclaimed films in Philippine motion picture history.

programme.title: Sabado Nights
programme.desc: This is a tale of love and friendship among three young women, whose lives centered on what they do every Saturday night.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabébé have arrived in his life.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster – Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! // Mayor Goodway’s purse chicken “Chickaletta” has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Daring Danny X is performing a new stunt! He is harnessed over a canyon eating an Extreme Lunch when the wind blows him upside down!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When all the tires on the Adventure Bay school bus blow out, Ryder volunteers to use the Paw Patroller as a substitute school bus. // When the famous singing songbirds of Adventure Bay go missing, it's PAW Patrol to the rescue!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups need to unplug Old Trusty the geyser to stop water sprouting up all over town. // Priscilla the pony gets the chance to help the Paw Patrol rescue their own vehicle after they help her out of a canyon.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Café Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a piñata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs a lot of pizzas, fast! But when Speed Meister steps in, the pups have to fix his pizza problem. // When a family can't get to the airport in time on Speed Meister's road, Rubble & Crew has to build a new road before takeoff.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris. // Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Marshall Kitty gets trapped inside a life-sized piñata. / Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take care of baby flowers Bouncy Blue, Dizzy Daisy, and Baby Rosette so Isa can attend a royal tea party. / Dora and Boots help baby Andrea find the magical leaf so she can receive her Alebrije powers and take care of the rainforest.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken accidentally shrinks Dora and Boots so it's up to Dora's little brother and sister to help get them big again.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. // Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Bears are asleep all over town! The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the bears and return them to their cave. // With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: It’s the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his "barking" kitties, Katie and the pups must rescue the town.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 4
programme.desc: Bidders go head to head in a battle over some super heavyweight freight, a can filled to the brim with outdoor adventure equipment contains a unique surprise, and a tailgaters dream could stop its winner short of the goal line.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 3
programme.desc: Caution -- these people are operating motor vehicles under the influence of DUMB. TruTV is counting down the 20 most hysterical Motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on the water. See an out-of-control mail truck, a wild road-rager, and a man treating a motorbike like it's his girlfriend. Our cast of souped-up comedians, including Kevin McCaffrey, Chris Fairbanks, Rachel Feinstein, and Mike Trainor have pulled up to the curb with plenty to say.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 6
programme.desc: With the final clue in hand, Jane attempts to gather the remaining Red John suspects in one place in hopes of finally revealing his identity.

programme.title: Full House S1 19
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to the family, Jesse leaves the house after becoming frustrated because of his lack of privacy.Part one of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Full House S1 20
programme.desc: The girls devise a scheme to bring their Uncle Jesse home after he leaves the house to find some privacy.Part two of a two-part episode.

programme.title: ER S1 4
programme.desc: Carter contacts the wrong parents to inform them that their son is dead. Ross is still attracted to Hathaway--who just moved in with Dr. John Taglieri.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 3
programme.desc: Caution -- these people are operating motor vehicles under the influence of DUMB. TruTV is counting down the 20 most hysterical Motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on the water. Our cast of souped-up comedians, including Kevin McCaffrey, Chris Fairbanks, Rachel Feinstein, and Mike Trainor have pulled up to the curb with plenty to say.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 11
programme.desc: The guys blindly follow each other's humiliating directions at a water park, compete to sell their ridiculous book ideas, and try to convince unknowing strangers to save their seats in Time Square.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 5
programme.desc: The Israelis' go hard after what they think is vintage clothing, but will their fashion expertise pay off? Mo and Ty go postal when the doors swing open to reveal some mysterious machinery, and a custom container could land at least one buyer behindbars.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 6
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus when four containers bound for Russia's Winter Games miss the boat. A waterlogged container piques everyone's interest, but can anything inside be salvaged? Plus, a Major League Baseball player gives Mo & Ty the lowdown on a state-of-the art piece of gym equipment

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 4
programme.desc: Not to boast, but we've got 20 of the World's Dumbest Show Offs and they're about to steal the show! From an out-of-control security guard to a dancer who kills it at a funeral - they all need attention, and they'll get plenty of it from our cast ofhilarious comedians, including Mike Britt, Rachel Feinstein and Gilbert Gottfried.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 7
programme.desc: Patrick Jane finally comes face to face with Red John, the serial killer he's tracked since the madman murdered his wife and daughter ten years ago.

programme.title: Full House S1 21
programme.desc: Jesse succeeds when he secretly plans an Elvis Presley tribute at a nightclub. Meanwhile, Joey attempts to pay back money that Danny lent him 11 years ago.

programme.title: Full House S1 22
programme.desc: D.J. takes advantage of Joey's gullible nature by convincing him that she is sick so she can skip school and sneak down to the mall to get Stacey Q's autograph.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 5
programme.desc: The Israelis' go hard after what they think is vintage clothing, but will their fashion expertise pay off? Mo and Ty go postal when the doors swing open to reveal some mysterious machinery, and a custom container could land at least one buyer behindbars.

programme.title: ER S1 5
programme.desc: A man prepares for his impending death because a heart donor can't be found. Greene's wife gets a new job. Carter thinks he contracted an STD. Dr. Ross helps a girl with asthma.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 2
programme.desc: Ashley's father wants her to continue with her violin lessons, but Will has other ideas.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 12

programme.desc: After a young American woman is brutally murdered in Venice, the Fly Team is met with hostility when they discover that their person of interest has ties to a well-connected Italian family.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 7)
programme.desc: John and Harper work together to catch Oscar; Angela investigates a bank robbery; Lucy and Tim learn to adapt to her new schedule, and Miles’ first date takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 8)
programme.desc: SWAT tackles a mission with personal ties for Hondo when they race to find a group of missing students and their bus driver, Hondo's former high school football coach.

programme.title: Fantasy Island (Season 2)
programme.desc: Gwen's fantasy is to go back in time and be the princess she longs to be -- pampered, rich and cared for -- but she soon finds out the king is preparing to marry her off to a cruel, ambitious prince.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 7)
programme.desc: With the rest of the team racing to stop an illicit weapons sale, Rex resolves to bring justice all on his own when he witnesses a murder while stuck at home.

programme.desc: Inspired by the television series and the feature film, S.W.A.T. stars Shemar Moore as a locally born and raised S.W.A.T. sergeant newly tasked to run a specialized tactical unit that is the last stop in law enforcement in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Red Eye (Season 2)
programme.desc: While Hana investigates a murder at Heathrow, a threat is made against Delaney’s jet.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 7)
programme.desc: While Donovan tracks a marine smuggling operation, the team investigates the night of a wedding to uncover why the best man ended up at the bottom of the Atlantic.

programme.title: FBI: International (Season 4)
programme.desc: When a televangelist on the most wanted list surfaces, the Fly Team’s attempts to take him down.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy pilot goes missing at a UFO hotspot in the Outback after being chased by blinding lights, the team must discover if the truth is really “out there."

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: A musician plagued by insomnia is pulled into an odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Tess is in over her head when she agrees to mentor a newly blind teenager for Mia while investigating a killer—or killers — using untraceable 3D printed ghost guns. Blood and killers? Sure. Moody teenagers? Hell no. As Tess and Sunny realize this is the work of two murderers working together despite not knowing each other, Sunny celebrates small wins as her therapist has taught her. Carried away by her healing journey, Sunny impulsively reaches out to her long lost mother, while Jake contacts Tess with a dangerous request.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 97
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 97
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's going on this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Kathryn Robinson.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 97
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Autumn: Iconic Foliage Garden & Begonias 101
programme.desc: Costa visits a lush historic garden, Sophie joins volunteers rescuing fruit from waste, Jerry shares his begonia expertise, Millie creates a mini crevice garden, and we meet an ecologist restoring Tasmania's Midlands.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S4)
programme.desc: A man falls asleep while driving and kills a construction worker on the road. Was he a reckless driver or an innocent man with an undiagnosed medical condition?

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: A 21-year-old man is charged with domestic terrorism after a spree of shootings on the freeway sends the public into panic. Facing over 100 years in prison, the young father claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a man and a woman are found shot, investigators struggle to find clues to catch the killer until a deputy locates the victim's car filled with guns, silencers, and a mysterious man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When an otherwise healthy woman is admitted to the hospital with sudden organ failure, an anonymous tip leads authorities to investigate a pattern of deaths in her family and a shocking prime suspect.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S1)
programme.desc: A man sees strange things on the deadly Karak Highway. Next, souls of dead children are kept in an amulet. Later, two men are spooked at a suicide spot.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S1)
programme.desc: Actress Mandy Chen feels a spirit following her after acting as a murdered victim. Next, six flatmates are spooked. Later, a photographer captures a haunting image.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a gas station robbery has a strange culprit; a driver arrested for DUI finds new ways to add to his rap sheet. And more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop; and more!

programme.desc: When a woman reports a brutal assault, investigators discover shifting stories, divided loyalties, and a jealous love triangle with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a storm hits Warwick Cove, RI, a boat dragging its anchor appears in the harbour with a decomposed corpse onboard. Pathologist Dr. Priya Banerjee must identify the John Doe and determine how he died.

programme.title: La Mer Au Loin
programme.desc: Nour, 27, clandestinely emigrates from Morocco to Marseille in search of a better future. With his friends, he lives off small trafficking operations and leads a marginal and festive life. When he meets Serge and Noemie, a charismatic and mysterious police officer and his wife, his existence takes an unexpected turn.

programme.desc: The chef draws inspiration from classic desserts and presents a simplified version of the Black Forest cake. Perfect for impressing guests on special occasions.
